Οὐαλέριος, ου, ὁ Valerius, freq. found as the name of a Roman gens (Diod S 11, 41, 1; 11, 60, 1; 13, 76, 1; 16, 46, 1) Valerius w. the cognomen Bito 1 Cl 65:1.

freq. freq. = frequent(ly)

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1
